creator: freezr@disroot.org
text:
Dear Maintainer,

this is a well know bug that affects Lagrange since version 1.7.3 and prevents the hamburger menu to be opened:

```
[command] {1} menu.open ptr:0x80ec2d780
[command] {0} cancel
[command] {1} menu.opened ptr:0x80e9a45c0
[command] {1} menu.closed ptr:0x80e9a45c0
```

https://github.com/skyjake/lagrange/issues/436

Release 1.10 fixed this problem as stated by Skyjake:

> The fix for menus not opening will be included in the upcoming v1.10 (to be
> released soon). Backporting to earlier stable releases is possible if needed.

https://github.com/skyjake/lagrange/issues/436#issuecomment-1013899536

Should you need further information please do not hesitate to ask!

Thanks,

tgl
